patch.value: The hooks capability has zero first-party exemplar; authors wanting to intercept writes/reads for audit/cache/telemetry have no reference. pm-governance-audit is the natural owner.
Registers an opt-in onWrite hook logging mutated path/scope to a sidecar; manifest gains hooks capability; unit test verifies firing; SDK.md hooks section references it.
The hooks capability has zero first-party exemplar; authors wanting to intercept writes/reads for audit/cache/telemetry have no reference. pm-governance-audit is the natural owner.
